name: Algomon (Baby II)

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Shoots bubble-like substances from its giant eye-like pattern.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese The form that a newborn Algomon grows into. It clings to places where high-capacity data leaks, and consumes that data through the mouth on its underside. When an enemy draws near, it spits out " San no Awa " from its giant eye-like pattern.
